name: Fast Pacing
description: Short sentences, rapid scene cuts, and action-forward momentum. Best for thrillers, action, and climactic sequences.
prompt_fragments: Keep sentences short — under 15 words on average during action sequences.
Cut scenes at moments of tension. Enter late, leave early.
Minimize description during action. Focus on movement, sound, and consequence.
Use sentence fragments for emphasis. One-word paragraphs are acceptable.
Dialogue should be rapid-fire. No speeches during fights.

lexicon_preferences.notes: Verb-heavy prose. Active voice exclusively. Minimize adverbs.

validation_heuristics: Flag paragraphs over 100 words during action sequences.
